summary: Built prompt-assemble tool with Light Enforced Mode. Tool location: tools/prompt-assemble. All tests passed (7/7). Features: 1) Assembly order following specification, 2) Light Enforced Mode triggers at pressure >= 0.85 with 12-turn window, 3) Integration with context-budget-check, context-compress, context-retrieve, 4) Layer-based output with token counts. Verified with health check and integration tests.
